tests.name: searchDesignKnowledge wrapper
tests.description: Verify knowledgeTools.searchDesignKnowledge correctly calls KnowledgeHub and returns structured results.

tests.name: getComponentAnatomy wrapper
tests.description: Verify getComponentAnatomy returns expected blueprints from registry.

tests.name: validateLayout wrapper
tests.description: Verify validationTools.validateLayout returns standardized error/warning structure.

tests.name: IpcBridge.callTool handshake
tests.description: Verify IpcBridge emits TOOL_CALL and resolves when TOOL_RESULT is received.

tests.name: IpcBridge timeout handling
tests.description: Verify IpcBridge returns a timeout error if no result is received within limit.

tests.name: Agent Identity Injection
tests.description: Verify composeAgentSystemPrompt includes assistant role and goal.

tests.name: Tool Serialization
tests.description: Verify ToolDefinition objects are correctly turned into readable text descriptions.

tests.name: Selection Context Lean Mode
tests.description: Verify current selection is summarized in the prompt.

tests.name: createFrame IPC call
tests.description: Verify createFrame tool correctly triggers IpcBridge.callTool.

tests.name: updateNodeProperties IPC call
tests.description: Verify updateNodeProperties tool correctly triggers IpcBridge.callTool.

tests.name: deleteNode IPC call
tests.description: Verify deleteNode tool correctly triggers IpcBridge.callTool.

tests.name: AgentOrchestrator Error Handling
tests.description: Verify AgentOrchestrator catches and reports AgentRuntime errors.
